articles.excerpt: Now there will be six categories – ₹1,600 crore, ₹1,600 crore to ₹4,000 crore, ₹4,000 crore to ₹50,000 crore, ₹50,000 crore to ₹1 lakh crore, ₹1 lakh crore to ₹5 lakh crore and more than ₹5 lakh crore
articles.content: Finance Ministry has revised norms for public shareholding framework of listed companies. Experts feel such a move aims balance market liquidity with the practical realities of large capital raising.…

articles.title: Curfew relaxed in Meghalaya's Garo Hills for church services
articles.excerpt: On Sunday, residents of Meghalaya's Garo Hills will benefit from a temporary 12-hour curfew relaxation, enabling them to attend church services. This decision follows a tumultuous period marked by violence during protests related to the GHADC elections, which…

articles.title: Australia Touts LNG Reliability as MidEast War Disrupts Flows
articles.excerpt: Australia’s government touted the country’s ability to supply LNG reliably as global energy markets are roiled by the Middle East conflict, while calling on trading partners to boost investment in its gas resources.
articles.content: Australia’s government touted the country’s ability to supply LNG reliably as global energy markets are roiled by the Middle East conflict, while calling on trading partners to boost investment in its gas resources.

articles.title: How Syria may exploit the situation - which it sees as a window of opportunity
articles.excerpt: The Syrian army is exploiting the regional escalation - which includes missile and UAV interceptions over southern Syria and Israel’s engagement on additional fronts - in order to move forces and expand its deployment in the area. Report.
